login.title: Welcome back!

register.title: Create account

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: No worries! Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentSubtitle: Check your inbox for the password reset link.
forgotPassword.sentText: If an account with this email exists, we've sent you a link to reset your password.

confirm.successText: Your email address has been confirmed. You can now sign in.
confirm.errorText: The confirmation link is invalid or expired. Please request a new link.

resendConfirmation.title: Request new link
resendConfirmation.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a new confirmation link.
resendConfirmation.sentSubtitle: Check your inbox for the new confirmation link.
resendConfirmation.sentText: If an unconfirmed account with this email exists, we've sent you a new confirmation link.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new, secure password for your account.
resetPassword.subtitleInvited: Set a password so you can sign in going forward.
resetPassword.successSubtitle: You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.successTextInvited: Your password has been saved. Redirecting to the dashboard...
resetPassword.successText: Your password has been reset successfully. Redirecting to sign in...
resetPassword.error: Password could not be reset. The link may have expired.

calendarIntegrations.subtitle: Connect external calendars to your family calendar.
